use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms, dialogs, and page sections
Navigation triggers with variant styles for destructive, secondary, and ghost actions
Interactive controls in data-heavy interfaces like tables and dashboards
Foundation component for building composite UI elements like dropdowns and popovers
Accessible button implementation with Radix UI Slot for polymorphic rendering
ai_summary: A foundational Button component built with Radix UI and class-variance-authority, following shadcn/ui design patterns. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon) for versatile use across interfaces. Clean, flat styling with standard Tailwind classes makes it suitable as a building block for composite components like dropdowns, modals, and form controls.
